requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
requirements.object: Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
requirements.object: immediate effect

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that an All India Financial Institution's existing Information Technology
(IT) outsourcing agreements regardless of whether they are due for renewal on or
after the effective date of these Directions shall comply with the provisions of these
Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier.
requirements.object: of these Directions either at the time of renewal or by April 10, 2026, whichever is earlier

requirements.full_sentence:
However, the All India Financial Institution's new IT outsourcing agreements that
come into force on or after the effective date of these Directions, shall comply with
the provisions of these Directions from the date of agreement itself.
requirements.object: of these Directions from the date of agreement itself

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided further that nothing in the preceding proviso shall be construed as
permitting non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory
requirements applicable to such arrangements.
requirements.object: non-compliance with any other extant regulatory instructions or statutory requirements applicable to such arrangements

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to All-India Financial Institutions (AIFIs)
namely Export Import Bank of India ('EXIM Bank'), National Bank for Agriculture
and Rural Development ('NABARD'), National Bank for Financing Infrastructure
and Development ('NaBFID'), National Housing Bank ('NHB') and Small Industries
Development Bank of India ('SIDBI'), hereinafter collectively referred to as 'AIFIs'
and individually as an 'AIFI'.
requirements.object: Financial Institutions (AIFIs) namely Export Import Bank of India ('EXIM Bank'), National Bank for Agriculture and Rural De

requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall apply to an AIFI's material outsourcing of IT services, as
defined in paragraph 6(3) of these Directions.
requirements.object: material outsourcing of IT services, as defined in paragraph 6(3) of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
In this context, 'Outsourcing of IT
Services' shall include outsourcing of the following services:
<image>
requirements.object: following services: <image>

requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall not apply to the following services:
requirements.object: services:

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of these Directions
requirements.object: - Commercial Banks

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, the 'Commercial Banks' means banking
companies (other than Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments
Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State
Bank of India, as defined respectively under clauses (c), (da), and (nc) of
section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
requirements.object: Small Finance Banks, Local Area Banks, Payments Banks and Regional Rural Banks), corresponding new banks, and the State

requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Group' shall be as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks -
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025, as amended from time to
time, for the purpose of intra-group transactions and exposures.
requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'Group' shall be as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Banks - Concentration Risk Manageme

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) 'IT services' means IT services / IT enabled services / IT activities.
requirements.object: enabled services / IT activities

conditions:
if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly impact the
AIFI's business operations
requirements.full_sentence:
(i) if disrupted or compromised shall have the potential to significantly impact the
AIFI's business operations;
requirements.object: significantly impact the AIFI's business operations

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) may have material impact on the AIFI's customers in the event of any
unauthorised access, loss or theft of customer information.
requirements.object: the AIFI's customers in the event of any unauthorised access, loss or theft of customer information

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'Outsourcing' means use of a third-party (either an affiliated entity within a
corporate group or an entity that is external to the corporate group) by an AIFI to
perform activities on a continuing basis that would normally be undertaken by the
AIFI itself, now or in the future.
requirements.object: (either an affiliated entity within a corporate group or an entity that is external to the corporate group) by an AIFI to perform

requirements.full_sentence:
'Continuing basis' shall include agreements for a
limited period.
requirements.object: limited period

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'Service Provider' means provider of IT services including entities related to the
AIFI or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the AIFI
belongs.
requirements.object: including entities related to the AIFI or those which belong to the same group or conglomerate to which the AIFI belongs

conditions: Provided that for the purpose of these Directions
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for the purpose of these Directions, the following indicative (but not
exhaustive) list of vendors and entities shall not be considered as 'Service
Providers' as defined above:
requirements.object: Providers' as defined above:

requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank
of India Act, 1934, or the Information Technology Act, 2000, or the Companies Act,
2013, and Rules made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI, or as used in commercial parlance,
as the case may be.
requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Information

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI intending to outsource its IT services shall put in place a comprehensive
Board-approved IT outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in
paragraph 15.
requirements.object: comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy, the coverage of which is indicated in paragraph 15

requirements.full_sentence: The Board shall be responsible, inter alia, for:
requirements.object: for:

conditions:
when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services
requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) ensuring either by itself or through its Committee, that there is no conflict of
interest arising out of third-party engagements, especially when permitting an
exception to the requirement that the service provider of outsourced services, if
not a group company, shall not be owned or controlled by any director, key
managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their
relatives as indicated under the proviso to paragraph 12(vi) of these Directions;
requirements.object: by any director, key managerial personnel, approver of the outsourcing arrangement, or their relatives as indicated under the p

requirements.full_sentence:
As stated in paragraph 8, the outsourcing of any IT service by an AIFI shall not
diminish its obligations, and those of its Board and Senior Management, who have
the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced service.
requirements.object: those of its Board and Senior Management, who have the ultimate responsibility for the outsourced service

requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) it shall not engage a service provider that would result in its reputation being
compromised or weakened;
requirements.object: that would result in its reputation being compromised or weakened
with the ability of the AIFI to effectively oversee and manage its services

requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'control', 'director', 'key
managerial personnel', and 'relative' shall have the same meaning as
assigned under the Companies Act, 2013, and the Rules framed thereunder
from time to time.
requirements.object: as assigned under the Companies Act, 2013, and the Rules framed thereunder from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that an exception to the above requirement may be made with the
approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate
disclosure, oversight, and monitoring of such arrangements.
requirements.object: above requirement may be made with the approval of Board or a Committee of the Board, followed by appropriate disclosure, oversigh

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall evaluate the need for outsourcing of IT services based on a
comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks and availability of
commensurate processes to manage those risks.
requirements.object: outsourcing of IT services based on a comprehensive assessment of attendant benefits, risks and availability of commensurate pro

requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the AIFI shall,
inter alia, consider the following:
requirements.object: the following:

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure that cyber incidents are reported to it by the service provider
without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the AIFI to the RBI within six
hours of detection by the service provider.
requirements.object: are reported to it by the service provider without undue delay, so that an incident is reported by the AIFI to the RBI wit

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI intending to outsource any of its IT services shall put in place a
comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the
following:
requirements.object: comprehensive Board-approved IT outsourcing policy incorporating, inter alia, the following:

requirements.full_sentence: The Senior Management of an AIFI shall, inter alia, be responsible for:
requirements.object: responsible for:

requirements.full_sentence: The responsibilities of the IT Function of an AIFI shall, inter alia, include:

An AIFI shall put in place a risk management framework that comprehensively
deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement,
mitigation, management, and reporting of risks associated with such IT outsourcing
arrangements.
requirements.object: risk management framework that comprehensively deals with the processes and responsibilities for identification, measurement, mitigatio

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall suitably document risk assessments with necessary approvals in line
with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,
and IT Function, and subject the same to internal and external quality assurance on
a periodic basis as determined by the Board-approved policy.
requirements.object: with necessary approvals in line with the roles and responsibilities of the Board of Directors, Senior Management,

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall effectively assess the impact of concentration risk posed by multiple
outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider, and the concentration risk
posed by outsourcing critical or material functions to a limited number of service
providers.
requirements.object: of concentration risk posed by multiple outsourcing arrangements to the same service provider, and the concentration ris

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall be responsible for the confidentiality and integrity of data and
information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider.
requirements.object: confidentiality and integrity of data and information pertaining to its customers that are available to the service provider

requirements.full_sentence:
Access by service providers to data at the AIFI or its data centre shall be on 'need
to know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches, or data
misuse.
requirements.object: know' basis, with appropriate controls to prevent security breaches, or data misuse

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall seek to ensure the security, preservation, and protection of the
customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider.
requirements.object: security, preservation, and protection of the customer information in the custody or possession of the service provider

requirements.full_sentence:
Access
to customer information by a service provider or its staff shall be on a 'need to
know' basis.
requirements.object: to know' basis

conditions:
where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
REs
requirements.full_sentence:
In instances, where a service provider acts as an outsourcing agent for multiple
REs, the AIFI shall take care to build adequate safeguards so that there is no
combining of information, documents, records, and assets.
requirements.object: adequate safeguards so that there is no combining of information, documents, records, and assets

requirements.full_sentence:
Explanation: With regard to requirement that data should not be combined or
comingled, it would suffice if there is clear separation, and isolation of data (AIFI,
and its customer specific data and information) to ensure that only the personnel as
authorised by the AIFI is able to access data that belongs to them in a multi-tenant
environment / architecture.
requirements.object: it would suffice if there is clear separation, and isolation of data (AIFI, and its customer specific data and information)

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall review and monitor the security practices and control processes of its
service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclose
security breaches.
requirements.object: security practices and control processes of its service providers on a regular basis and require the service provider to disclo

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall immediately notify RBI in the event of breach of security, and leakage
of confidential customer-related information.
requirements.object: the event of breach of security, and leakage of confidential customer-related information

requirements.full_sentence:
In these eventualities, the AIFI shall
adhere to the extant instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident
Response and Recovery Management.
requirements.object: instructions issued by RBI from time to time on Incident Response and Recovery Management

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall perform appropriate due diligence while considering or renewing an
outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply
with obligations in the outsourcing agreement on an ongoing basis.
requirements.object: while considering or renewing an outsourcing arrangement, to assess the capability of the service provider to comply

requirements.full_sentence:
The due diligence mentioned above shall involve an evaluation of all available
information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
requirements.object: all available information, as applicable, about the service provider, including but not limited to:
service performance

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall adopt a risk-based approach in conducting such due diligence
activities.
requirements.object: in conducting such due diligence activities

requirements.full_sentence:
Where possible, an AIFI shall obtain independent reviews and market feedback on
the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence.
requirements.object: market feedback on the service provider to supplement the findings of its own due diligence

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure that its rights and obligations and those of each service
provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement.
requirements.object: and obligations and those of each service provider are clearly defined and set out in a legally binding written agreement

requirements.full_sentence:
In
principle, the provisions of the agreement shall appropriately reckon the criticality of
the outsourced task to the business of the AIFI, the associated risks, and the
strategies for mitigating or managing them.
requirements.object: of the outsourced task to the business of the AIFI, the associated risks, and the strategies for mitigating or ma

requirements.full_sentence:
The terms and conditions governing the outsourcing arrangement shall be carefully
defined and vetted by the AIFI's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability.
requirements.object: vetted by the AIFI's legal counsel on their legal effect and enforceability

requirements.full_sentence:
The AIFI shall ensure that such an agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow the AIFI
to retain an adequate control over the outsourced service, and the right to intervene
with appropriate measures to meet legal and regulatory obligations.
requirements.object: agreement is sufficiently flexible to allow the AIFI to retain an adequate control over the outsourced service, and the right to i

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement
shall also bring out the nature of legal relationship between the parties.
requirements.object: nature of legal relationship between the parties

requirements.full_sentence:
The agreement at a minimum shall include (as applicable to the scope of these
Directions) the following aspects:
requirements.object: the scope of these Directions) the following aspects:

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall have in place a management structure to monitor and control its
outsourced services.
requirements.object: management structure to monitor and control its outsourced services

requirements.full_sentence:
This shall include (as applicable to the scope of these
Directions), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems
and resources, service availability, adherence to SLA requirements, and incident
response mechanism.
requirements.object: the scope of these Directions), but not be limited to, monitoring the performance, uptime of the systems and resources, serv

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall conduct regular audits (as applicable to the scope of these Directions)
of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the service outsourced
by it.
requirements.object: applicable to the scope of these Directions) of service providers (including sub-contractors) with regard to the service ou

requirements.full_sentence:
Such audits may be conducted either by AIFI's internal or external auditors
appointed to act on AIFI's behalf.
requirements.object: AIFI's internal or external auditors appointed to act on AIFI's behalf

requirements.full_sentence:
While outsourcing various IT services, more than one RE may be availing services
from the same service provider.
requirements.object: the same service provider

requirements.full_sentence:
In such scenarios, in lieu of conducting separate
audits by individual REs of the common service provider, they may adopt pooled
(shared) audit.

However, in doing so, it shall be the responsibility of REs in ensuring that
<image>
the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider
are met effectively.
requirements.object: REs in ensuring that <image> the audit requirements related to their respective contract with the service provider are met ef

requirements.full_sentence:
The audits shall assess, inter alia, the performance of the service provider,
adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and
compliance with laws and regulations.
requirements.object: performance of the service provider, adequacy of the risk management practices adopted by the service provider, and compliance

requirements.full_sentence:
The frequency of the audit shall be
determined based on the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the AIFI from the
outsourcing arrangements.
requirements.object: the nature and extent of risk, and impact on the AIFI from the outsourcing arrangements

conditions:
in case of any adverse
development
requirements.full_sentence:
Reports on the monitoring and control activities shall be
reviewed periodically by the Senior Management, and in case of any adverse
development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information.
requirements.object: the Senior Management, and in case of any adverse development, the same shall be put up to the Board for information

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI, depending upon the risk assessment, may also rely upon globally
recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of
conducting independent audits.
requirements.object: recognised third-party certifications made available by the service provider in lieu of conducting independent audits

requirements.full_sentence:
However, this shall not absolve the AIFI of its
responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls, and procedures required to
safeguard data security (including availability of systems) at the service provider's
end.
requirements.object: its responsibility in ensuring assurance on the controls, and procedures required to safeguard data security (including availabili

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall periodically review the financial, and operational condition of the
service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations.
requirements.object: and operational condition of the service provider to assess its ability to continue to meet its obligations

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall
adopt risk-based approach in defining the periodicity.
requirements.object: defining the periodicity

requirements.full_sentence:
Such due diligence reviews
shall highlight any deterioration or breach in performance standards, confidentiality
and security, and operational resilience preparedness.
requirements.object: breach in performance standards, confidentiality and security, and operational resilience preparedness

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure that the service provider grants unrestricted and effective
access to (a) data related to the outsourced services;
requirements.object: provider grants unrestricted and effective access to (a) data related to the outsourced services

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall create an inventory of IT services outsourced to service providers
(including key entities involved in their supply chains).
requirements.object: IT services outsourced to service providers (including key entities involved in their supply chains)

requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the AIFI shall map its
dependency on third parties, and periodically evaluate the information received from
the service providers.
requirements.object: third parties, and periodically evaluate the information received from the service providers

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall require its service providers to develop and establish a robust
framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing Business Continuity Plan
(BCP), and Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP) commensurate with the nature, and
scope of the outsourced service as per extant instructions issued by RBI from time
to time on BCP / DR requirements.
requirements.object: to develop and establish a robust framework for documenting, maintaining, and testing Business Continuity Plan (BCP), an

requirements.full_sentence:
In establishing a viable contingency plan, an AIFI shall consider the availability of
alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced service
back in-house in an emergency, and the costs, time, and resources that would be
involved.
requirements.object: alternative service providers or the possibility of bringing the outsourced service back in-house in an emergency, and th

requirements.full_sentence:
In order to mitigate the risk of unexpected termination of the outsourcing agreement
or insolvency or liquidation of its service provider, an AIFI shall retain an appropriate
level of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene
with appropriate measures to continue its business operations.
requirements.object: of control over its outsourcing arrangement along with the right to intervene with appropriate measures to continue its bu

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure that its service providers are able to isolate the AIFI's
information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions
or termination of the agreement, all documents, records of transactions, and
information given to the service provider, and assets of the AIFI, can be removed
from the possession of the service provider, or deleted, destroyed or rendered
unusable.
requirements.object: providers are able to isolate the AIFI's information, documents, and records, and other assets so that in adverse conditions o

requirements.full_sentence:
The IT outsourcing policy shall contain a clear exit strategy with regard to
outsourced IT services, for ensuring business continuity during and after exit.
requirements.object: strategy with regard to outsourced IT services, for ensuring business continuity during and after exit

requirements.full_sentence:
The strategy shall include plans for different scenarios of exit, or termination of
services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary.
requirements.object: scenarios of exit, or termination of services with stipulation of minimum period to execute such plans, as necessary

requirements.full_sentence:
In documenting its exit strategy, an AIFI shall, inter alia, identify alternative
arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service
provider, or by the AIFI itself.
requirements.object: alternative arrangements, which may include performing the service by a different service provider, or by the AIFI itself

requirements.full_sentence:
A service provider shall be legally obliged to co-operate fully with both the AIFI and
its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition.
requirements.object: co-operate fully with both the AIFI and its new service provider(s) to ensure there is a smooth transition

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI shall ensure that outsourcing agreements have necessary clauses on safe
removal or destruction of data, hardware, and all records (digital and physical), as
applicable.
requirements.object: have necessary clauses on safe removal or destruction of data, hardware, and all records (digital and physical), as

requirements.full_sentence:
The outsourcing agreement shall ensure that the service provider is prohibited from
erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any data during the transition
period, unless specifically advised by the RBI, or the concerned AIFI.
requirements.object: provider is prohibited from erasing, purging, revoking, altering, or changing any data during the transition period

conditions: where the service provider deals with the customers of the AIFI
requirements.full_sentence:
In the event of termination of the outsourcing agreement for any reason in cases
where the service provider deals with the customers of the AIFI, the same shall be
given due publicity by the AIFI so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with
the concerned service provider.
requirements.object: by the AIFI so as to ensure that the customers stop dealing with the concerned service provider

conditions: provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy
requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI may outsource any IT service within its business group / conglomerate,
provided that such an arrangement is backed by the Board-approved policy, and
appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place.
requirements.object: backed by the Board-approved policy, and appropriate SLAs / agreements with its group entities are in place

requirements.full_sentence:
The selection of a group entity shall be based on objective reasons that are similar
to selection of a third-party, and the AIFI shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of
interest that such an outsourcing arrangement may entail.
requirements.object: reasons that are similar to selection of a third-party, and the AIFI shall appropriately deal with any conflicts of interest tha

requirements.full_sentence:
An AIFI, at all times, shall maintain an arm's length relationship in dealings with its
group entities.
requirements.object: relationship in dealings with its group entities

requirements.full_sentence:
Risk management practices being adopted by the AIFI while
outsourcing to a group entity shall be identical to those specified for a non-related
party.
requirements.object: specified for a non-related party

requirements.full_sentence:
In principle, outsourcing arrangements shall only be entered into with parties
operating in jurisdictions that generally uphold confidentiality clauses, and
agreements.
requirements.object: with parties operating in jurisdictions that generally uphold confidentiality clauses, and agreements

requirements.full_sentence: While engaging with service provider(s) in a foreign country, an AIFI shall:

Considering the risks associated with outsourcing of Security Operations Centre
(SOC) operations by an AIFI, such as data being stored, and processed at an
external location, and managed by the service provider (or its sub-contractors) to
which the AIFI has lesser visibility, the AIFI, to mitigate the risks, shall adopt the
following requirements in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations, in addition to
the controls prescribed in these Directions:
definition, customisation, and related data / logs, meta-data, and analytics
(specific to the AIFI);
requirements.object: in the case of outsourcing of SOC operations, in addition to the controls prescribed in these Directions: definition,

requirements.full_sentence:
Considering the varied services, benefits, and risk profiles associated with the cloud
deployment and service models, an AIFI that uses cloud services for storage,
computing, and movement of data in cloud environments shall, in addition to other
applicable provisions in these Directions:
requirements.object: other applicable provisions in these Directions:

requirements.full_sentence:
Such
assessment shall include, but not be limited to, an analysis of various heads of
cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration,
consulting, migration, and projected recurring expenditure depending on the
nature of workloads.
requirements.object: limited to, an analysis of various heads of cloud-related expenditure, such as application refactoring, integration, consulting, m

requirements.full_sentence:
The extent of cloud adoption may vary, ranging from
migration of non-business critical workloads to the cloud, to deployment of
critical business applications such as SaaS, or other combinations in between,
and shall be determined based on a duly conducted business technology risk
assessment;
requirements.object: a duly conducted business technology risk assessment
procedures are consistent with business needs, and legal and regulatory requirements

requirements.full_sentence:
For cloud security best practices, an AIFI may refer to, inter alia, NIST SP 800-
210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems
https://nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/NIST.SP.800-210.pdf
<image>
requirements.object: NIST SP 800- 210 General Access Control Guidance for Cloud Systems https://nvlpubs

requirements.full_sentence:
Such a policy shall, inter
alia,

An AIFI shall enter into a contract only with CSPs that
are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements, and the
rights available thereunder to the AIFI, including those relating to aspects such
as data storage, data protection, and confidentiality;
requirements.object: only with CSPs that are subject to jurisdictions that uphold enforceability of agreements, and the rights available thereunder t

requirements.full_sentence: The technology architecture shall:

(a) factor, inter alia, agreed processes and turnaround times for returning the
AIFI's service collaterals and data held by the CSP, data completeness,
and portability, secure purge of AIFI's information from the CSP's
environment, smooth transition of services and unambiguous definition of
<image>
liabilities, damages, penalties and indemnities, which should also be a

An AIFI shall have a robust grievance redressal mechanism that shall not be
compromised in any manner on account of outsourcing, i.e., responsibility for
redressal of customers' grievances related to outsourced services shall rest with the
AIFI.
requirements.object: manner on account of outsourcing, i

requirements.full_sentence:
Outsourcing arrangements entered into by an AIFI shall not affect the rights of its
customers against the AIFI, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal
as applicable under relevant laws.
requirements.object: its customers against the AIFI, including the ability of the customers to obtain redressal as applicable under relevant laws

requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed
prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these
Directions.
requirements.object: by these Directions
affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

requirements.full_sentence:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions, instructions, or guideline

requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being
in force.
requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time being in force

requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions, or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein, and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
